prestazioni: Engine swap to a Nissan ZD30DDTi (3.0L inline-4 turbo diesel, 160-170hp stock) with a BorgWarner EFR 7670 turbo (1060cc/min flow, titanium compressor wheel) and custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust featuring a Tomei 80mm titanium cat-back system, paired with a Link G4+ Xtreme standalone ECU for precise fuel and boost mapping (targeting 280-300hp with 550Nm torque).

Upgraded drivetrain with a Nismo LSD (part #38420-41L00) for the rear axle (R200 differential) and a custom 3.90:1 gear ratio set from JUN Auto, combined with a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (part #3000 951 040) and a Nismo lightweight flywheel (part #12301-41L00) to handle increased torque.

Suspension overhaul using Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (part #DFV 22/30-1) with custom valving for the E24/E25 chassis, paired with polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF0116K) for the front control arms and rear trailing arms, along with a Whiteline front sway bar (24mm, part #BKR97X) and rear sway bar (22mm, part #BKR98X) to reduce body roll.
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using Rocket Bunny Caravan-specific overfenders (part #RB-CV01) and rear quarter panels, paired with a custom front bumper lip from C-West (JDM-spec, part #CW-NCV-FLIP) and a rear diffuser from Veilside (part #VS-NCV-RD).

Full aero package including a carbon fiber hood from Seibon (part #NH-CV-E24-CF) with a custom heat extractor vent, side skirts from Garage Vary (JDM-spec, part #GV-NCV-SS), and a roof spoiler from Trust/GReddy (part #601-00001).

Wheel setup featuring Work Emotion CR Kiwami in 18x9.5 +15 front and 18x10.5 +20 rear (ET adjusted for fitment), wrapped in Toyo R888R tires (245/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear), with custom center caps featuring the Caravan logo in gold leaf.
